purpose: Close the phase-02 MainActivity presentation rows after replacing the bootstrap diagnostic panel with a real startup-seeded route host and shell chrome behavior.

set.targetBehavior: EntryAbility still resolves the startup route before content loads, and FoodikeBootstrap now acts as the real phase-02 route host rather than a diagnostic panel. The host is seeded from `bootstrapStartRoute`, keeps onboarding/login/home/history/cart/profile/detail as concrete route surfaces, exposes the shell-owned cart command and home/history tab commands, and limits shell chrome to the same home/history-at-top contract as `SetupNavigation` in the source app.
verificationEvidence: Manual code review: entry/src/main/cangjie/app_ability.cj::EntryAbility.onCreate resolves `bootstrapStartRoute` before entry/src/main/cangjie/app_ability.cj::EntryAbility.onWindowStageCreate loads the bootstrap page, preserving the source startup-owned shell handoff.

Manual code review: entry/src/main/cangjie/ohos_app_cangjie_entry/app/bootstrap_page.cj::FoodikeBootstrap.currentRoute, showBottomShell, and runPrimaryAction now compose route-specific surfaces and shell commands instead of a route picker/debug dashboard.

Test verification: `cjpm.exe test --target aarch64-linux-ohos` passed in `D:\workspace\Foodike\Foodike-Harmony\entry` with the phase test env overlay on 2026-06-25, covering entry/src/test/cangjie/phase02_startup_navigation_test.cj including `primaryActionTargetsMatchShellContract`, `bottomShellOnlyShowsOnTopLevelHomeAndHistoryRoutes`, `resolvesLoggedOutUsersToOnboarding`, and `resolvesLoggedInUsersToHome`.
set.notes: This row no longer needs `implemented-simplified`: the phase-02 shell remains a single page host, but that still matches the source MainActivity responsibility because the Android activity also only composes the nav host and shell rather than owning feature-page logic directly.

set.targetBehavior: The startup observable path is now fully represented in the runtime route host: EntryAbility reads the persisted login state, StartupStore resolves the first route before page load, FoodikeBootstrap initializes `currentRoute` from that resolved value, and `@State` updates continue to recompute shell visibility from route changes and shared top-of-list state. This preserves the source MainActivity contract of observing startup state before composing navigation and of keeping shell UI reactive to navigation state.
verificationEvidence: Manual code review: entry/src/main/cangjie/ohos_app_cangjie_entry/features/startup/startup_store.cj::StartupStore.resolveStartRoute and entry/src/main/cangjie/app_ability.cj::EntryAbility.onCreate resolve the startup route before UI content loads, matching the source splash-gated observation contract.

Manual code review: entry/src/main/cangjie/ohos_app_cangjie_entry/app/bootstrap_page.cj::FoodikeBootstrap.currentRoute and isShellAtTop are `@State` fields that directly drive visible route and shell-chrome recomposition inside the startup host.

Test verification: `cjpm.exe test --target aarch64-linux-ohos` passed in `D:\workspace\Foodike\Foodike-Harmony\entry` with the phase test env overlay on 2026-06-25, covering entry/src/test/cangjie/phase02_startup_navigation_test.cj including `startupStorePublishesResolvedRouteAndClearsLoading`, `resolvesLoggedOutUsersToOnboarding`, `resolvesLoggedInUsersToHome`, and `bottomShellOnlyShowsOnTopLevelHomeAndHistoryRoutes`.
set.notes: Closed as equivalent because MainActivity only observes one-shot startup state plus nav/shell state for composition; the target now preserves both with runtime store-to-route seeding and `@State`-driven shell updates instead of keeping them in a placeholder bootstrap summary page.
